# Note: we had 1.1.0 pinned for python-dotenv, but must pin 1.0.1 due to an orchestrate library update:
# TODO: update to 1.1.0+ when ADK is compatible
# pip:      The user requested python-dotenv==1.1.0
# pip:      ibm-watsonx-orchestrate 1.6.2 depends on python-dotenv>=1.0.0
